QQQ +0.8% today, tracking tech strength broadly. Similar to SPY, no urgent catalyst to initiate here when limited cash could be better deployed into higher-conviction single names. Watchlist only.

TSLA up +0.7% today with no specific catalyst noted. The EV adoption thesis remains speculative at current valuations and no new fundamental evidence supports initiating a position at these levels. Watchlist only.

META +2.2% today, continuing its strong run on AI advertising monetization and Llama ecosystem momentum. However, the stock has appreciated significantly and entering on a momentum day without a fresh specific catalyst runs against Rule #4. Watch for consolidation or a pullback entry point.

AMZN +1.5% today with AWS and advertising thesis intact. No specific new catalyst to distinguish this from general market strength. Limited cash available; watchlist only until a clearer entry setup or pullback materializes.

ARM's valuation is already elevated and entering after a +5.8% session would be chasing. Adding to watchlist with heightened interest for a pullback entry.

The -3.7% alone does not meet fundamental change criteria. Monitor for a catalyst-driven entry thesis before considering addition.

APLD down -6.6% today, a significant single-day decline in a high-risk AI data center infrastructure play. This volatility combined with no clear positive catalyst makes initiation inadvisable. Watchlist only pending fundamental evidence of stabilization.
